programs.sub_title: A Night of the New Moon
programs.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcome a baby boy, but their marriage crumbles; a bitter custody battle follows; fearing for her safety, Diane turns to a man skilled in self-defense, but as it turns out, someone else is in grave danger.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: When a captivating, sweet-natured single mom is found dead in her garage, detectives in Frisco, Texas, uncover a series of potential suspects, all of them connected in different ways to her complicated and secretive life.

programs.title: The Killer Among Us
programs.desc: Trust no one in this chilling preview of Oxygen's The Killer Among Us, hosted by Alan Cumming.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: The fire breaks out before dawn; after the smoke clears, a mother of two young children is found dead; it's the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it is just the beginning.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: A man makes a frantic call to 911 after finding his wife dead in a bathtub, but the couple's daughters lead police to investigate their father.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the brutal murder of their mother; the prosecution builds their case around what they thought those kids observed, but another version of events may be possible.
